Notice Of Motion To Compel Production Of Documents And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-26-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Constantin Roboostoff,Esq., for Plaintiff/Moving party Aubrey Webb
Joshua N. Rosen, Esq., for Defendant/Opposing party City & County of S.F.

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Audrey Webb's motion to compel production of documents is granted. Defendant is ordered to provide the requested documents within 5 days of notice of this order. The Court finds that defendant opposed the instant motion without substantial justification. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $1140 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories, Production Of Documents, And Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar Jul-13-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Constantin V. Roboostoff for plaintiff and moving party Audrey Webb
Joshua Rosen for defendant and opposing party Stacy and Witbeck, Inc.

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted with modification. Plaintiff Audrey Webb's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories #1, request for production #1
The motion is moot as responses have been provided. The Court makes no rulings as to the adequacy of any responses. The parties are ordered to meet and confer. Failure to respond in a timely fashion thereby requiring the filing of the instant motion was a misuse of the discovery process.
MODIFICATION: Sanctions Award is striken.
COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
